tasks.label: Build & Deploy Windows Debug
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-debug && cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug' && cp out/build/windows-x86-debug/keeperfx.exe .deploy/keeperfx.exe && echo 'Deployed.'

command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-debug && cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug';

tasks.label: Build Windows x86 Release
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-release && cmake --build --preset windows-x86-release'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-release && cmake --build --preset windows-x86-release'

tasks.label: Build Linux x64
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm linux bash -c 'cmake --preset linux-x64-release && cmake --build --preset linux-x64-release'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm linux bash -c 'cmake --preset linux-x64-release && cmake --build --preset linux-x64-release'

tasks.label: Build Vita Release
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-release && cmake --build --preset vita-release'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-release && cmake --build --preset vita-release'

tasks.label: Build Vita RelDebug
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-reldebug && cmake --build --preset vita-reldebug'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-reldebug && cmake --build --preset vita-reldebug'

tasks.label: Build Vita Debug
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-debug && cmake --build --preset vita-debug'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm vitasdk bash -c 'cmake --preset vita-debug && cmake --build --preset vita-debug'

osx.command: echo 'Init .deploy/ is Windows-only. Copy DK originals to .deploy/ manually on Mac.'

linux.command: echo 'Init .deploy/ is Windows-only. Copy DK originals to .deploy/ manually on Linux.'

tasks.label: Generate compile_commands.json
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-debug -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --preset windows-x86-debug -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON'

tasks.label: Clean Windows Debug
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug --target clean'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --build --preset windows-x86-debug --target clean'

tasks.label: Clean Windows Release
tasks.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}/docker/compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --build --preset windows-x86-release --target clean'

windows.command: docker compose -f '${workspaceFolder}\docker\compose.yml' run --rm mingw32 bash -c 'cmake --build --preset windows-x86-release --target clean'

tasks.label: Fetch Vita Debugger Plugins
command: if (!$kvdbId) { Write-Host 'ERROR: Failed to pull ghcr.io/cerwym/vita-kvdb:latest' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 };
if (!$vdbtcpId) { Write-Host 'ERROR: Failed to pull ghcr.io/cerwym/vita-vdbtcp:latest' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 };
Write-Host 'Vita debugger plugins saved to out/vita-tools/' -ForegroundColor Green;

tasks.label: Deploy Vita Debugger
command: Write-Host 'ERROR: Plugins not found. Run Fetch Vita Debugger Plugins first.' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1
Write-Host 'Plugins deployed to ur0:/tai/ — reboot Vita to load.' -ForegroundColor Green;

inputs.description: Path to local .psp2dmp crash dump file
